message:
Implement structured concurrency combinators

- Add JoinAll combinator (N-way join) with 33 unit tests
- Add Quorum combinator for M-of-N consensus patterns
- Add Hedge combinator for latency hedging
- Add Retry combinator with exponential backoff
- Add Watch channel for single-value broadcast
- Update mod.rs exports for all new combinators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
